# SPECTRE-CLASS RESEARCH SHUTTLE
[color=#a4885c]Ship Size:[/color] Large
[color=#a4885c]Recommended Crew:[/color] 3-5
[color=#a4885c]Power Gen Type:[/color] AME
# Shuttle Brief
"A large, robust vessel with a pure focus on research and development. It is equipped with multiple artifact chambers."

# Hiring crew
[textlink="Hiring" link="Hiring"/]
As a Captain of a Nanotrasen vessel, you have the authority to hire, fire, demote, or promote crew members at will.
